Class AppContent

java.lang.Object
org.tailormap.api.persistence.json.AppContent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Generated(value="org.openapitools.codegen.languages.SpringCodegen", comments="Generator version: 7.22.0") public class AppContent extends Object implements Serializable
Configuration for including content (layers) in an application.
